Adobe, In Design, Figma, JIRA, Excel and Power Point. Self development of skills to keep up to date with fast changing trends •    Languages - Business Communication Role Specific Technical Competencies •    HCD Thinking •    UX Research •    Communication Skills •    Visual Design •    Planning About Standard Chartered We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. title: Design Development Manager - Singapore
best_module: ID2107 – Design Platforms A
description: The Role We are seeking a Design Development Manager to grow our presence amongst Specifiers, Designers & Architects in the luxury premium space in Singapore. Fisher & Paykel has been designing products since 1934 and has grown into a global company operating in 50 countries and manufacturing in Mexico, Italy, Thailand, and New Zealand. Our design heritage is founded on a pioneering spirit and a culture of curiosity that has challenged conventional appliance design. Our goal is to be the world's number one premium appliance brand. Not only does this mean we design and build the best appliances, but that we understand who our key customers are and engage with them according to their very specific needs. The Specifier, Designer & Architect space is essential to our strategy and requires a very special skill set to develop and leverage the key relationships required. From identifying key clients, through networking and engaging with them, it's vital to our success that we've got the right person on the job. As our Design Development Manager, you will be at the forefront of cultivating relationships with top-tier specifiers, designers, and architects. Your goal will be to create strategic plans and deliver initiatives that increase product market share and achieve profitable growth. At the heart of Fisher & Paykel are our people who design innovative technologies that elevate the everyday into something out of the ordinary. We have built our business by creating moments of delight for the people who use our products. The Design Development Manager here at Fisher & Paykel Singapore is focused on creating long-lasting relationships with top-tier specifiers, designers, and architects within the country and will report directly to the SG Head of Marketing. In this role, you will work closely with specifiers and influence them to incorporate our brands into their designs. You will be a brand ambassador, promoting our portfolio of products, engaging in design discussions, facilitating product trainings, and networking within the designer/architect community. This will, in turn, drive sales through both our Builder and Retail networks. This is an individual contributor role for some who enjoys owning things end-to-end, working close to the business, and operating in a fast-moving environment. In The Role, You Will Be the subject matter expert for Fisher & Paykel within the SDA community by being curious and deeply understanding key specifier communities and their environmental influences. Initiate, develop, and attend key designer networking events within our Fisher & Paykel Singapore Showroom to strengthen existing relationships and create new opportunities for Fisher & Paykel brand, products, and services. Ensure a seamless, brand-aligned representation of Fisher & Paykel’s value proposition across all touchpoints of the key specifier community. Plan and execute the local design development strategy with key specifiers, ensuring alignment with global imperatives and growth aspirations. Provide regular reporting updates on key specifiers to the local and global Market Group. Deliver product training that is sufficiently technical but more tailored to business benefit and competitive advantage. Manage third-party agency partnerships and formulate performance and metric scorecards. Ensure the accuracy and completeness of our brand and product messaging to key specifiers. Act as a liaison for design requirements across market channels You Have Minimum of 5 years’ experience in the appliance or building industry, in a design, project management, or sales/marketing role. Marketing, Business, or Interior Design preferred in conjunction with relevant design credentials (AKBD, CKD, Leed AP). Working experience with interior/kitchen designers and architects. Proven experience in successfully developing strategic partnerships both externally and internally to deliver quality results. Strong creative & technical design skills, including the ability to read floor plans and elevations, and make recommendations on appliance selection, placement, and configuration based on spatial and proportional characteristics of the kitchen, as well as design trends and principles. Strong project planning and management experience. Excellent communication skills – verbal and written communication skills are clear and concise. Strong team player Fisher & Paykel is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.

title: Product Designer
best_module: ID2107 – Design Platforms A
description: At Meta, we’re shaping innovative experiences in service of giving people the power to build community and bring the world closer together. Our multidisciplinary design teams are creating new ways to help people connect, find communities and grow businesses. Together, we are committed to building innovative technologies — Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, WhatsApp, Workplace, Meta Quest and more — to serve billions of people around the globe. As a product designer at Meta, you’ll have the opportunity to play a central role in the way we build technologies — ensuring they are valuable, easy to use and of the highest level of craft and execution. You’ll be involved in every aspect of the product development process, from brainstorming the next great product innovation to tweaking pixels right before launch. We’ll expect you to utilize your full range of product design, interaction design and visual design skills, while contributing to high-level strategic decisions with product and executive partners. Join a broad group of thinkers and do some of the most meaningful work of your career. This posting represents different full-time roles across the Meta company. Responsibilities Take broad, conceptual ideas and turn them into something useful and valuable for our 2 billion plus users Design flows and experiences that simplify and distill down complex actions into usable interfaces Design new experiences or layouts that evolve and define visual systems Contribute to strategic decisions around the future direction of Facebook products Give and solicit feedback from designers and a broader product team in order to continually improve for quality Drive a partnership with product managers, engineers, researchers and content strategists in order to oversee the user experience of a product from conception until launch illingness to represent work to a broader product team and other leaders, clearly and succinctly communicating the goals and concepts Minimum qualifications Bachelor's degree in Design, Human-Computer Interaction, Computer Science, or a related field 1+ years designing complex software products with a focus on user experience, interaction, and visual design that meet business objectives Experience conducting advanced usability testing and gathers feedback from varied stakeholders to inform product strategy Experience developing and implementing design strategies, leads design efforts, and presents to executive-level stakeholders Proficiency in prototyping tools and building high-fidelity prototypes that effectively communicate design concepts Preferred qualifications Experience connecting your work with other related initiatives across the company while driving collaboration Examples of leadership in non-product dimensions that have made a team stronger and positively impacted the work environment such as taking on mentorship opportunities Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics.

ADM also promotes Singapore’s creative culture and identity and is positioned to play a central role in the transformation of Singapore into a regional center of media and creativity. Post-graduate programs combine theory and practice, offering MA and PhD by research and a MA in Museum and Curatorial Practice. In 2026 ADM will start an innovative MSc Game Design Art & Technology, taught jointly with the College of Computer and Data Sciences (CCDS). ADM ranks amongst the top 5 art and design schools in Asia and top 20 worldwide (QS World University Rankings by subject 2025). NTU is a research-intensive university, home to 33,000 undergraduate and postgraduate students in Engineering, Science, Humanities, Social Science, Business, Education and Medicine. Ranked amongst the world’s top 30 universities by QS, NTU has also been named amongst the world’s top young universities for the past 7 years. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 1. Drawing Preparation & Detailing - Develop detailed architectural and façade shop drawings, fabrication drawings, and installation layouts using AutoCAD and/or Tekla. - Prepare accurate cutting lists, material schedules, and assembly details for fabrication and site execution. - Translate design concepts, sketches, and engineering inputs into clear and buildable technical drawings. - Maintain drawing accuracy and consistency across all revisions and project stages. 2. Design Coordination - Collaborate with engineers, project managers, and site teams to ensure drawings align with project specifications and buildability requirements. - Coordinate with consultants, subcontractors, and suppliers to obtain and incorporate design information and approvals. - Assist in the preparation and submission of shop drawings, method statements, and mock-up documentation for consultant and client review. - Review and update drawings to reflect approved design changes and variation orders. 3. Quality & Compliance - Ensure all drawings comply with project specifications, codes of practice, and internal quality standards. - Perform self-checks to maintain accuracy and completeness of drawings before submission. - Support the QA/QC process by updating as-built drawings and ensuring proper document control. - Work with the Safety team to incorporate safety-related elements and installation methods into design documentation. 4. Technical & Site Support - Provide technical support to site teams during installation and fabrication stages. - Attend coordination and progress meetings when required to clarify drawing-related issues. - Conduct site measurements and verification to ensure drawings reflect actual conditions. KEY COMPETENCIES · Strong technical drawing and detailing skills using AutoCAD and/or BIM software. · Solid understanding of façade systems, architectural finishes, and construction methods. · High attention to detail, accuracy, and consistency in documentation. · Strong coordination and communication skills across departments and disciplines. · Ability to prioritize and manage multiple drawing packages under tight deadlines. · Commitment to quality, precision, and continuous improvement. REQUIREMENTS · Diploma or Certificate in Civil Engineering, Architecture, Building & Construction, or a related field. · Minimum 3–5 years of drafting experience in architectural or façade projects. · Proficiency in AutoCAD is essential; experience with other BIM/drafting software is an advantage. · Familiar with architectural and structural detailing, fabrication drawings, and construction documentation. · Knowledge of BCA and local authority standards preferred. · Able to work independently with minimal supervision and part of a collaborative project team. · Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn and adapt to new tools or systems. · Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently with minimal supervision. WORKING CONDITIONS · The standard working week is five (5) days; however, you may be required to work on Saturdays and Sundays depending on project requirements. · Office-based with periodic site visits for measurement verification and coordination.

title: UX Researcher

description: As a UX Researcher, you will play a critical role in helping company develop deep, actionable insights into the needs, behaviors, and desires of our customers. This is essential for the creation and continuous improvement of our products and services. This role involves planning and executing research studies, interfacing directly with customers, synthesising qualitative and quantitative data and insights across the organisation, contributing to the research strategy, and working closely with senior stakeholders and the wider UX research team. What you'll be doing You will contribute to the UX Research function by carrying out both qualitative and quantitative research across company’s digital product portfolio. Your responsibilities include: Research Execution: Oversee and conduct a broad range of generative, iterative, and evaluative design research activities, such as user interviews, surveys, usability tests (web and mobile), A/B testing, and card sorting. Insight Generation: Synthesise complex qualitative and quantitative data to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights, ensuring meticulous documentation of findings. Strategic Mixed-Methods Synthesis: Move beyond single-study reports to blend qualitative insights with quantitative datasets (like CSAT trends and product analytics), creating a single, high-confidence narrative for product strategy. Organisational Translation: Act as a research consultant across multiple product lines, identifying patterns that impact the whole company while translating specific nuances for individual teams. Stakeholder Communication: Create compelling research reports and presentations for senior management that present analysis and recommendations succinctly and clearly, translating research findings into actionable product, design, and business strategies. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work collaboratively with designers, product managers, engineering teams, and business partners. Participate in design brainstorming sessions and workshops to guide design decisions and collaborate on potential solutions to issues in a timely manner. Requirements At least 4 years of experience in UX research. Proven ability to design and synthesise quantitative research, leveraging data from CSAT, surveys, and analytics to triangulate findings and recommend next steps. Direct experience with diverse research methods, including both traditional and modern approaches to recruitment and reporting. Proficient in user research principles, methodologies, and deliverables, such as service design blueprints, journey maps, and process flows. Ability to select the right research and synthesise timely insights into coherent, actionable deliverables for design, product, business, and technology teams. Expertise in defining research objectives with product, design, brand, and engineering teams to support the entire product lifecycle. Strong understanding of product design processes and emerging technologies. Comfortable collaborating with Product, Tech, Data, and Business partners to deliver quality services and experiences. Familiarity with design and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, Adobe Creative Suite). Demonstrates systems thinking, planning, and has successfully implemented projects in dynamic, agile environments. Good-to-have B.A. or M.A. in Psychology, HCI, Service Design, or other behavioral sciences. Advanced degree, training, or certification in service design, UX design, or related design fields. Experience with advanced quantitative research methods and tools. Business proficiency in a vernacular language (Chinese, Indian or Malay).

(e.g. TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube). Provide support for collaborative projects with stakeholders and partners. A successful candidate would be · A diploma or tertiary graduate holding qualifications in Mass Communications, Marketing, Journalism, Multimedia Arts, or a related field. · Minimum experience of two years in communications, marketing, or a social media role, with a portfolio showcasing video content production. · Demonstrates expertise in creating engaging short-form video content for social media platforms (Facebook, TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube). · Proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final. Cut Pro, CapCut) and graphic design tools (Adobe Photoshop, Canva). · Strong written and verbal communication skills, with a keen eye for detail and good copywriting abilities. · Ability to conduct sensitive interviews and extract compelling stories from individuals, particularly those from diverse backgrounds. · Good command of English and able to speak a second language (Mandarin, Malay, Tamil) and/or local dialects to communicate with. · Good understanding of social media trends, best practices, and analytics. · Ability to work independently and as part of a team · A passion for our charity's mission and a genuine desire to make a positive impact. · Comfortable to uphold, communicate and affirm Habitat for Humanity’s principles (vision and mission); Pls refer to https://www.habitat.org.sg/about-us for details. If you are interested to join us and be part of our exciting and meaningful ministry, please email us your complete curriculum vitae . Do include a cover letter with your salary expectations and email it to hr@habitat.org.sg . Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for an interview. Habitat's Expectations Surrounding Safeguarding: Habitat for Humanity requires that all employees take seriously their ethical responsibilities to safeguarding our intended beneficiaries, their communities, and all those with whom we work. Managers at all levels have particular responsibilities to support and develop systems that create and maintain an environment that prevents harassment, sexual exploitation and abuse; safeguards the rights of beneficiaries and community members (especially children); and promotes the implementation of Habitat for Humanity's code of conduct.

Preferred Qualification(s): - Experience in reinforcement learning, transfer learning, and counter-factual optimization is a plus. - Understanding of the business value of online advertising. - Experience with user modeling using deep learning methods from large scale datasets. Experience with privacy preserving modeling techniques is a plus. - Experience in developing modern ads ranking/retrieval/targeting systems and recommender systems.

Effectively bilingual with proficiency in Chinese equivalent to ‘HSK Level 6' or ‘Business Chinese Test (BCT) Advanced or higher'. Proven experience in content strategy, SEO/AIO/AEO/GEO optimisation, and digital storytelling. Strong editorial and copywriting capabilities in both English and Chinese, with a clear, engaging, and adaptable writing style, and across formats—blog articles, web copy, email campaigns, and social media content—with a clear, audience-first approach. Proven ability to craft compelling narratives and adapt messaging for different platforms, while maintaining brand voice and institutional credibility. Solid understanding of modern SEO principles, including keyword targeting, metadata optimisation, and content structuring for search engines and social platforms. Familiarity with how content is discovered across traditional search, generative AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT), and social platforms (e.g. TikTok, LinkedIn). Working knowledge of tools like Google Search Console, SEMrush, or similar, with ability to translate insights into action. Experience using tools like Google Analytics, HubSpot, or equivalent to assess content impact across traffic, engagement, and conversion metrics. Ability to derive content insights from data and translate them into optimised content strategy and reporting narratives. Hands-on experience creating and adapting content across web, email, and social channels (LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok). Working understanding of platform trends and engagement formats, with the ability to optimise content for different devices and audiences. Proven ability to collaborate with internal teams, freelancers, and agency partners to deliver timely and effective content. Strong project management and organisational skills, with the ability to juggle multiple content streams and campaign deadlines. OTHER INFORMATION #LI-XL1 Candidates who do not possess the stipulated qualifications but have relevant work experience may still apply. Regional Leadership & Communication: Outstanding leadership, communication (both written and oral), and interpersonal skills for leading a diverse, multi-market practice. Innovation & Future-Forward Mindset: Highly forward-thinking with a relentless curiosity for emerging trends and technologies (GenAI in paid social/media, DCO, automation) relevant to APAC. Strong understanding of creative's interplay with paid media performance. Technical & Platform Fluency: Advanced proficiency in social media advertising platforms, bidding strategies, measurement tools, and analytics. Extensive experience with all major social advertising platforms and media buying tools prevalent in APAC. title: PR Manager - South-East Asia
best_module: ID4122 – Design Entrepreneurship and Creative Leadership
description: Wise is unlike any other financial services company. You'll be part of a global movement that is bringing transparency and irreversible positive change around the world. Opportunities are everywhere here - to try something new, to learn, to do meaningful and impactful work, and they're yours for the taking. There's no corporate nonsense and no old-fashioned hierarchy. Instead, we work in individually responsible and empowered teams where you'll get tons of guidance and support from your Lead and talented, super-smart colleagues from all over Wise. So, if you're an experienced PR professional with a passion for high-impact storytelling and hands-on execution experience across South East Asia (particularly in the Philippines ), we'd like to hear from you. In this critical role, you'll drive our PR efforts, developing and executing integrated PR strategies, managing agency partners, and delivering measurable results through compelling storytelling. This is a hands-on execution role with strategic input, perfect for someone looking to own markets end-to-end. This role will be based in our Singapore office. What you'll do: Own strategy and execution: Develop and implement comprehensive communications plans that cover earned media, integrated campaigns, product launches, and BAU press office. You'll manage everything from press release drafting to media relationship building and event coordination ensuring consistent excellence across all communications activities. Drive high-quality campaign execution: Lead integrated PR campaigns that drive brand fame and business results in both markets. Think creator-led travel activations in Malaysia, product education campaigns in Philippines, cultural moment newsjacking, and experiential brand experiences. You'll bring creative ideas to life while managing timelines, budgets, and cross-functional stakeholders. Manage agency partnerships: Oversee PR agencies providing clear briefs, constructive feedback, and performance management. You'll optimise their outputs, ensure ROI, and know when to handle work in-house vs. delegate to agencies. Build strong working relationships that help agencies be effective extensions of our team. Generate consistent media coverage: Secure regular earned media placements for product launches, partnership announcements, and thought leadership that position Wise as the leading cross-border payments solution in both markets. Build and maintain strategic media relationships: Cultivate relationships with journalists and editors across business, technology, lifestyle, and consumer media in both countries. You'll pitch compelling stories, respond to media inquiries, and position our spokespeople as go-to experts on cross-border payments and fintech innovation. Tell market-specific stories: Develop culturally relevant narratives for Filipino and Malaysian audiences. Work cross-functionally: Partner with Marketing, Product, Growth, and Expansion teams in both markets to ensure communications efforts are aligned. You'll be the comms voice in campaign planning sessions, providing media perspective and ensuring brand consistency. Drive performance measurement: Track and report on PR activities with clear metrics showing coverage volume, quality, reach, message penetration, and business impact. Use data to optimise future campaigns and demonstrate ROI. Qualifications What you'll bring: Proven PR execution experience: You've spent 5-7 years building your career in public relations, with demonstrable experience owning campaigns end-to-end. You've worked in-house delivering measurable results through earned media, integrated campaigns, and creative activations. Regional expertise: You have an understanding of the cultural nuances, and business environment, with ability to quickly learn and understand each. You know the key outlets, journalists, and what makes news in Southeast Asian markets especially in the Philippines . You have established media relationships you can leverage immediately. Strong execution and project management: You can juggle multiple projects simultaneously - splitting your time between Philippines and Malaysia means you're organised, prioritise ruthlessly, and deliver on time. You've successfully managed campaigns with multiple workstreams, tight deadlines, and competing stakeholder needs. Stakeholder management skills: You can manage relationships with marketing managers, product leads, and country managers effectively. You know how to influence cross-functional partners, push back professionally when needed, and build trust through delivery. You're comfortable managing up and providing proactive updates. Creative thinking with practical execution: You can develop fresh campaign concepts rooted in market insights while being pragmatic about budgets and timelines. You know what will actually work vs. what sounds good in theory. You balance creativity with feasibility. Strong writing and communication skills in English & at least one other language ( Proficiency in Tagalog is a bonus ): Crafting press releases, pitches, social posts, and briefing documents is second nature to you. You write clearly and persuasively, adapting tone for different audiences and channels. You can translate complex product features into compelling stories. Valid Singapore work rights: You already have the right to work in Singapore (we cannot provide visa sponsorship for this role). What's in it for you: We offer you a position in the driving seat at one of the world's foremost tech companies and a chance to truly be a part of something great. It goes without saying that you'll be a part of a fun, friendly atmosphere, with plenty of opportunities to grow personally and professionally. You'll get a competitive salary, flexible work hours and the opportunity for international travel. Everyone gets shares in the company too, because we believe that what we're building belongs to each of us.

title: PR Lead - Asia
best_module: ID4122 – Design Entrepreneurship and Creative Leadership
description: Wise is unlike any other financial services company. You'll be part of a global movement that is bringing transparency and irreversible positive change around the world. Opportunities are everywhere here - to try something new, to learn, to do meaningful and impactful work, and they're yours for the taking. There's no corporate nonsense and no old-fashioned hierarchy. Instead, we work in individually responsible and empowered teams where you'll get tons of guidance and support from your Lead and talented, super-smart colleagues from all over Wise. So, if you're an experienced PR leader with a passion for building brands, driving strategic communications, and leading with impact, we'd like to hear from you. In this regional senior role, you’ll work with the APAC Head to support the region collaborating directly with the APAC Regional Leadership & Marketing teams while also driving our growth in Singapore & Japan .  This role is based in our Singapore office. What you'll do: Lead integrated creative campaigns: Plan and execute PR-led campaigns that drive brand fame and measurable business impact. Develop culturally relevant concepts for Singapore and Japan in tandem with our local agencies and freelancer partners. Develop regional frameworks and playbooks: Create communications frameworks, crisis protocols, and campaign playbooks alongside the team that markets can adopt. Document best practices and build systems that help the team scale effectively. Manage agency partnerships: Directly oversee PR agency relationships in your markets, conducting performance reviews, optimising outputs, and ensuring ROI while providing strategic inputs to the Asia team on their respective agency relationships. Partner cross-functionally: Work closely with Marketing, Brand, Product, and Regional Leadership teams to ensure communications efforts are aligned and reflect consistent brand voice. Provide comms counsel that shapes business strategy Handle crisis and issues management: Lead rapid response communications during sensitive situations, coordinating with global teams and providing steady leadership under pressure. Drive performance tracking: Manage and report on PR activities with clear metrics that demonstrate impact. Connect PR outcomes to business results and inform future planning with data-driven insights. Qualifications What you'll bring: Leadership experience: You've spent 8-12 years building your career in public relations, with proven experience leading communications strategy or senior leadership roles. You've worked in-house at tech or fintech companies where you've both set strategy and delivered excellent execution. You're comfortable interfacing with C-suite and regional leadership, providing counsel that influences business decisions and you have the gravitas and judgment to be trusted as a proxy for the APAC Head from time to time. Tech/fintech sector expertise: You understand product launches, regulatory complexity, fast-paced environments, and how to communicate technical concepts simply. Strategic thinking with execution excellence: You can develop comprehensive communications strategies and roll up your sleeves to execute campaigns. You're not too senior to write a press release or brief an agency, but you're strategic enough to shape regional direction. Quality standards and feedback: You can differentiate between excellent and good work, providing constructive feedback that elevates team output without bottlenecking workflow. You review quickly, give clear direction, and maintain high standards while being pragmatic about timelines. Regional mindset: Asia experience is a must - you've worked across multiple markets and understand how to adapt strategies for local context. You're comfortable working across time zones and collaborating with global teams. Strong writing and communication skills: Crafting press releases, strategic briefs, campaign concepts, and leadership communications is second nature to you. You can distill complex information into compelling narratives and adapt tone for different audiences. Crisis management experience: You can handle sensitive situations with composure, having experience managing issues in regulated or complex environments. You know how to protect brand integrity while navigating challenging situations. It'll be ideal if you: Are already based in Singapore, and have valid Singapore work rights Have PR experience in both Japan and Singapore markets What's in it for you: We offer you a position in the driving seat at one of the world's foremost tech companies and a chance to truly be a part of something great. It goes without saying that you'll be a part of a fun, friendly atmosphere, with plenty of opportunities to grow personally and professionally. You'll get a competitive salary, flexible work hours and the opportunity for international travel. Everyone gets shares in the company too, because we believe that what we're building belongs to each of us. You'll also get other benefits which you can find out more about here .

COMPANY OVERVIEW VERSANT is a leading force in news, sports and entertainment - home to iconic and trusted brands that inspire, inform, and delight audiences. Our unique combination of content, technology and services enriches the cultural fabric, igniting passions, sparking conversations, and connecting people to what they love most. As an independent, publicly traded company, VERSANT brings together powerhouse cable networks - including USA Network, CNBC, MS NOW (formerly MSNBC), Oxygen, E!, SYFY, and Golf Channel - with dynamic digital and direct-to-consumer brands such as Fandango, Rotten Tomatoes, GolfNow, GolfPass, and SportsEngine. Together, these businesses reflect our commitment to delivering exceptional experiences across every screen and service. VERSANT is an industry-changing media company fueled by innovation and an entrepreneurial spirit. With a strong foundation and a forward-looking vision, VERSANT empowers creativity, embraces change, and drives connection in an ever-evolving world. CNBC INTERNATIONAL CNBC is the world’s number one business and financial news network. Its mission is to help the influential and aspirational make astute decisions to get ahead by providing live market updates, breaking news, in-depth analysis and exclusive interviews. CNBC’s vast portfolio includes CNBC.com, the online destination for global business; CNBC PRO, the network’s premium subscription service that provides real-time global market data and market analysis, as well as a growing slate of live and virtual events where consumers can experience CNBC’s award-winning journalism, live. With headquarters in New Jersey, London, Singapore, and Abu Dhabi, CNBC provides a truly global 24-hour business briefing for senior business leaders, the financial community and those with assets to invest or protect. up stories and blog posts ranging from individual stock movements to sector trends, as well as global economics and financial markets. and economic news for Asia-Pacific Prior experience and proven ability to write stories on market movers, company earnings and business/sector analysis Independent worker who is able to write clean and accurate copy, while making smart decisions in a fast-paced, breaking news environment Excellent written and verbal communication skills, ability to foster good relations with colleagues, contacts and sources A clear understanding of CNBC’s editorial and programming priorities Strong command of English Familiar with data sources for research purposes Ability to prioritize a wide range of tasks while operating under tight deadlines Proactive self-starter who takes initiative to follow up on story ideas and search for new angles to
cover broad investment themes Flexible and able to work different shifts occasionally, including on weekends or public holidays, when required DESIRED ATTRIBUTES While not essential for this role, candidates with experience or proficiency in the following attributes tend to excel in this position. Three (3) or more years of experience working for a leading business news website or publication. Prior experience working with digital media and content management systems.
